data.title: Vaimo names Farah Aslam CEO, North America, as part of plan to strengthen leadership and expand presence in the region.
data.description: Vaimo, a worldwide digital experience agency, revealed today the selection of Farah Aslam as CEO for North America on January 13, 2026. This move demonstrates Vaimo's commitment to bolstering its management team and growing its influence in the area.

data.title: BlazeSports America helps Paralympian Al Mead become USOPA Georgia Chapter President, first in U.S. history.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, it was reported that Mead has achieved a significant milestone by becoming the inaugural Paralympian in the United States to head a USOPA chapter. This historic achievement took place in Atlanta with BlazeSports America, a key part of the U.S. Olympic and Paralympic Multi-Sport Organization Council renowned for its work in adaptive sports and recreation. This signals a new chapter in USOPA as a respected figure from the Paralympic world leads the way, underscoring the organization's commitment to inclusivity and diversity in sports leadership.

data.title: CME Group launching 100-ounce Silver futures contract on Feb 9, 2026 due to high retail demand.
data.description: Today, CME Group, the top derivatives marketplace globally, revealed plans to introduce a new futures contract for 100 ounces of silver on February 9, 2026, pending regulatory approval. The decision comes as silver gains popularity among retail traders seeking to diversify their investments.

data.title: Onebrief raises $200M in Series D at $2.15B valuation, acquires Battle Road Digital to enhance wargaming.
data.description: Onebrief, based in Honolulu, has successfully concluded a Series D funding round, raising an impressive $200 million. This funding has led to a post-money valuation exceeding $2 billion. Additionally, Onebrief has made a strategic move by acquiring Battle Road Digital, a step aimed at broadening their next-generation wargaming capabilities.

data.title: Qstream launches Qstream SMS for job-critical learning, boosting engagement with fast, timely SMS delivery.
data.description: Today, in Burlington, Massachusetts, Qstream announced the introduction of Qstream SMS, a new channel for distributing microlearning content. Qstream is a widely used microlearning platform by large corporations to provide essential learning materials efficiently. This new offering aims to enhance the accessibility and delivery of job-relevant learning materials to a broad audience.

data.title: Hexagon US Federal appoints Elliott Ferguson as President, emphasizing commitment to operational excellence and strategic growth.
data.description: In Chantilly, Virginia, Hexagon US Federal recently revealed changes in leadership and organizational roles to strengthen operational efficiency and drive strategic growth in serving government clients. Effective January 2nd, Elliott Ferguson assumed the role of President at Hexagon US Federal. Ferguson, who has been a part of the company for almost seven years, previously served as the Vice President of the Geospatial Solutions Business Unit. This transition underscores the company's dedication to mission success, with a focus on enhancing services for government customers.

data.title: Teradata completes over 150 AI engagements in 2025, accelerating AI innovation for global enterprises.
data.description: Today in San Diego, on January 13, 2026, Teradata (NYSE: TDC) revealed a notable progress in providing AI-driven solutions for worldwide corporations. In the year 2025 alone, Teradata successfully carried out over 150 AI-centric customer projects, aiding firms in implementing AI efficiently on a large scale...

data.title: USAA data shows differences in Gen X vs. Millennial parents' financial behaviors for Gen Alpha. Over 579,000 Youth accounts analyzed.
data.description: A recent analysis from USAA Federal Savings Bank has shed light on the financial habits of Gen Alpha, the generation born in 2010 or later, as they begin to shape their spending and saving behaviors. Contrasted with the closely scrutinized Gen Z, consisting of individuals born between 1997 and 2009, the study delved into data from more than 579,000 USAA Bank Youth Checking and Savings accounts. The findings unveiled the impact of parental influence on Gen Alpha's financial decisions, as they emerge as the economy's upcoming cohort.

data.title: Genpact research shows 12% leading shift to autonomous enterprise with key enablers. NY, Jan.13, 2026.
data.description: Recent studies identify four key factors that facilitate the transition from experimenting with artificial intelligence to establishing the groundwork for an autonomous enterprise. The findings were presented by Genpact (NYSE: G), a prominent provider of cutting-edge technology solutions, based in New York. The report, published on January 13, 2026, highlights essential strategies for organizations seeking to evolve their AI capabilities.

data.title: NYSE reports pre-market updates and banking giants starting earnings season. JD Durkin delivers news on Jan 13.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) released its daily pre-market update via PRNewswire. Traders can obtain valuable market insights directly from the NYSE Trading Floor before the start of trading. The pre-market update for that day was presented by JD Durkin.

data.title: Premier Plus Lending appoints Mike Pandazos as Director of Strategic Growth, enhancing expansion in California.
data.description: In Los Angeles on January 13, 2026, Premier Plus Lending (PPL) welcomed Mike Pandazos as the Director of Strategic Growth. This new appointment aims to bolster the company's growth efforts and cement its status in California. This move underscores PPL's commitment to expanding its operations and enhancing its market presence.

data.title: Fidelity predicts bright future for Bitcoin in 2026 as it matures. Will it reach its potential?
data.description: The financial services firm has presented a clear bullish outlook for Bitcoin as it continues to grow. The firm is optimistic about the potential for Bitcoin to rise in value as it evolves. Will this optimistic perspective on Bitcoin's future become a reality?

data.title: JPMorgan reported Q4 2025 net income of $13B ($4.63 per share), exceeding analyst estimates with $46.8B revenue. Loans and deposits saw significant growth. Markets revenue increased by 17%. ROE was 17%, ROTCE - 20%. $4.7B provision for credit losses.
data.description: JPMorgan Chase & Co. reported its fourth-quarter 2025 earnings, with a net income of $13.0 billion ($4.63 per share), down 7% Y/Y, and adjusted earnings per share of $5.23, beating the $4.92 analyst estimate. The managed net revenue was $46.8 billion, higher than the expected $46.02 billion. Net interest income excluding Markets reached $23.9 billion, up 4% Y/Y. Noninterest revenue (excluding Markets) rose 7% Y/Y to $14.7 billion. Markets revenue grew 17% Y/Y to $8.2 billion. The firm reported a return on equity of 17% and a return on tangible common equity of 20% for fiscal year 2025. Cash and marketable securities totaled $1.5 trillion. Average loans and deposits increased 9% and 6% Y/Y respectively. The provision for credit losses was $4.7 billion. Net charge-offs were $2.5 billion. JPMorgan Chase posted strong financial performance in various segments, despite some declines in specific areas.

data.title: Evercore ISI initiates Reddit stock with buy rating due to advertising growth potential and AI potential. (Characters: 99)
data.description: A financial firm, Evercore ISI, has started covering Reddit's stock, giving it a buy rating due to its promising advertising growth prospects. The company believes that Reddit has the potential for significant growth in this area. The coverage was published in an article titled "Reddit Stock Initiated With Buy Call On Bullish Advertising Growth, AI Potential" on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Delta Air Lines announces Q4 earnings, 2026 guidance, and Boeing deal in response to increasing demand.
data.description: On Tuesday, Delta Air Lines revealed its fourth-quarter earnings and provided guidance for 2026, while also announcing a significant deal with Boeing. The company's latest financial report and forward-looking projections suggest positive results, with an emphasis on the increasing demand in the aviation industry. This news underscores Delta's strategic moves as it navigates a changing market landscape. The Boeing deal and projected figures for 2026 point towards an optimistic outlook for the airline, reflecting its efforts to capitalize on emerging opportunities in the sector.

data.title: JPMorgan Chase and Bank of New York Mellon's earnings results diverge, trading tightly ahead of quarterly reports.
data.description: Leading financial institutions JPMorgan Chase and Bank of New York Mellon are experiencing contrasting trading patterns as they approach a significant week filled with quarterly bank earnings reports. While JPMorgan Chase is maintaining stability in its trading activity, Bank of New York Mellon is diverging in its performance. Investors are closely watching these developments as they anticipate the upcoming announcements from both banks. This information was not disclosed by the Investor's Business Daily, where the news was originally published.

data.title: Dow falls on inflation report; Delta stock plunges on earnings news.ibile's Daily.
data.description: After a surprising CPI inflation report, the Dow Jones index experienced a reversal on Tuesday. Delta stock plummeted following its earnings announcement. The stock market today saw the Dow reversing due to the unexpected inflation report and Delta's dive in earnings. Live coverage of the events was provided by Investor's Business Daily.
